mnemonics.title: 2PL Phases
mnemonics.content: GROW before you SHRINK: Growing phase first, then Shrinking

mnemonics.title: MVCC Versions
mnemonics.content: Time Travel for Data: Older versions stay until garbage collected

visualTips.visualization: Imagine linked list of data versions with timestamps

analogies.analogy: Like reading from a library archive while new editions are being written
